name: Cat Fest Beef Meat Sticks for cats 45g
description: Classic rich taste, high nutritional properties of real farm beef – better for your meow friend. Ingredients: beef meat, plant products, minerals. Analytical Components: crude protein 26%, fats 9%, crude fiber 0.1%, moisture 25%; energy value – 193 kcal. Usage: Serve as a treat during the day. Adjust the amount according to your pet’s needs and condition. Do not overdo it.
